value.found_quote: To support long-running interactions, you can use compaction to reduce context size while preserving state needed for subsequent turns. Compaction helps you balance quality, cost, and latency as conversations grow. Server-side compaction... For explicit control, use the standalone compact endpoint for stateless compaction in long-running workflows.
value.rationale: The page explicitly documents both manual (standalone compact endpoint via /responses/compact) and automatic (server-side compaction via context_management with compact_threshold) compaction features offered by OpenAI. These are described as mechanisms to compress conversation/context to extend effective working memory in long-running interactions, directly matching the claim. The page presents these as current, available features with code examples and no indication of preview or deprecated status.
